author: Bio
install_msg: Transcribe loaded! Set your OpenAI API key with `[p]transcribeset apikey <key>`, then enable in your server with `[p]transcribeset enable`.
name: Transcribe
short: Auto-transcribe Discord voice messages using OpenAI Whisper.
description: Listens for Discord voice messages and automatically transcribes them using the OpenAI Whisper API. Replies to the original message with a clean embed showing the transcription. Supports per-server enable/disable and optional channel restrictions.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data. Voice message audio is sent directly to the OpenAI Whisper API for transcription and is not retained.
